```{r}
      style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      ),
    'Total Calls' = colDef(
      sticky = "left",
      minWidth = 150,
      maxWidth = 150,
      resizable = TRUE,
      style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      )
    ),
  striped = TRUE,
  highlight = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE,
  outlined = TRUE,
  compact = TRUE,
  wrap = FALSE,
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    align = "center",
    minWidth = 100,   # minimum width
    maxWidth = 500,  # maximum width
    resizable = TRUE # allow user to drag/resize
    ),
  defaultPageSize = 15,
  pagination = TRUE
)
```
:::
:::
:::

```{r, include = FALSE}
table_cs_min <- df_clean %>%
  filter(final == 1, region %in% c(9, 10, 11, 12, 16, 19))

table_cs_min <- table_cs_min %>%
  mutate(barangay = case_when(
		`barangay` == 40254 ~ "Potungan, Dapitan, Zamboanga Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 40281 ~ "Olingan, Dipolog, Zamboanga Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 40568 ~ "Dohinob, Pres Manuel A. Roxas, Zamboanga Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 40715 ~ "Lunday, Sibuco, Zamboanga Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 40951 ~ "Binuay, Dimataling, Zamboanga Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 41577 ~ "Capisan, Zamboanga, Zamboanga Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 41587 ~ "Kasanyangan, Zamboanga, Zamboanga Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 42024 ~ "Libertad, Tungawan, Zamboanga Sibugay",
		`barangay` == 5892 ~ "Barangay 11, Malaybalay, Bukidnon",
		`barangay` == 6169 ~ "Damilag, Manolo Fortich, Bukidnon",
		`barangay` == 6215 ~ "Langcataon, Pangantucan, Bukidnon",
		`barangay` == 20446 ~ "Buru-un, Iligan, Lanao Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 25394 ~ "Mantic, Tangub, Misamis Occidental",
		`barangay` == 25481 ~ "Cogon, Balingasag, Misamis Oriental",
		`barangay` == 25568 ~ "Carmen, Cagayan De Oro, Misamis Oriental",
		`barangay` == 25704 ~ "San Juan, Gingoog, Misamis Oriental",
		`barangay` == 25731 ~ "Kamelon, Initao, Misamis Oriental",
		`barangay` == 25919 ~ "Casinglot, Tagoloan, Misamis Oriental",
		`barangay` == 12579 ~ "Banbanon, Laak, Davao De Oro",
		`barangay` == 12669 ~ "Magcagong, Maragusan, Davao De Oro",
		`barangay` == 12715 ~ "Union, Monkayo, Davao De Oro",
		`barangay` == 12825 ~ "La Paz, Carmen, Davao Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 12886 ~ "Madaum, Tagum, Davao Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 12893 ~ "Mankilam, Tagum, Davao Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 13082 ~ "Barangay 31-D, Davao, Davao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 13109 ~ "Cabantian, Davao, Davao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 13149 ~ "Lizada, Davao, Davao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 13609 ~ "Badas, Mati, Davao Oriental",
		`barangay` == 12055 ~ "Busaon, Banisilan, Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 36431 ~ "Lebe, Kiamba, Sarangani",
		`barangay` == 37217 ~ "Apopong, Gen. Santos, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 37236 ~ "San Isidro, Gen. Santos, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` %in% c(37318, 37318) ~ "Poblacion, Polomolok, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 37268 ~ "Zone IV, Koronadal, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 37288 ~ "Upper Maculan, Lake Sebu, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 37304 ~ "Cannery Site, Polomolok, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 37367 ~ "Bukay Pait, Tantangan, South Cotabato",
		`barangay` == 692 ~ "La Caridad, Prosperidad, Agusan Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 738 ~ "Bayugan 2, San Francisco, Agusan Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 807 ~ "New Tubigon, Sibagat, Agusan Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 13749 ~ "Laguna, Cagdianao, Dinagat Islands",
		`barangay` == 13772 ~ "Albor, Libjo, Dinagat Islands",
		`barangay` == 38877 ~ "San Juan, Surigao, Surigao Del Norte",
		`barangay` == 39036 ~ "Telaje, Tandag, Surigao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 39149 ~ "Kauswagan, San Agustin, Surigao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 21197 ~ "Pagalongan Masioon, Ditsaan-Ramain, Lanao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 21426 ~ "Balagunun, Maguing, Lanao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 21951 ~ "Gapao Balindong, Taraka, Lanao Del Sur",
		`barangay` == 23804 ~ "Tamontaka, Datu Odin Sinsuat, Maguindanao",
		`barangay` == 23805 ~ "Tanuel, Datu Odin Sinsuat, Maguindanao",
		`barangay` == 24003 ~ "Lepak, Pandag, Maguindanao",
		`barangay` == 24074 ~ "Bongo, South Upi, Maguindanao",
		`barangay` == 38418 ~ "Anuling, Patikul, Sulu",
		`barangay` == 38425 ~ "Gandasuli, Patikul, Sulu",
		`barangay` == 39878 ~ "Panglima Alari, Sitangkai, Tawi-Tawi"
    ),
    `barangay` = factor(`barangay`, levels = c("Potungan, Dapitan, Zamboanga Del Norte", "Olingan, Dipolog, Zamboanga Del Norte", "Dohinob, Pres Manuel A. Roxas, Zamboanga Del Norte", "Lunday, Sibuco, Zamboanga Del Norte", "Binuay, Dimataling, Zamboanga Del Sur", "Capisan, Zamboanga, Zamboanga Del Sur", "Kasanyangan, Zamboanga, Zamboanga Del Sur", "Libertad, Tungawan, Zamboanga Sibugay", "Barangay 11, Malaybalay, Bukidnon", "Damilag, Manolo Fortich, Bukidnon", "Langcataon, Pangantucan, Bukidnon", "Buru-un, Iligan, Lanao Del Norte", "Mantic, Tangub, Misamis Occidental", "Cogon, Balingasag, Misamis Oriental", "Carmen, Cagayan De Oro, Misamis Oriental", "San Juan, Gingoog, Misamis Oriental", "Kamelon, Initao, Misamis Oriental", "Casinglot, Tagoloan, Misamis Oriental", "Banbanon, Laak, Davao De Oro", "Magcagong, Maragusan, Davao De Oro", "Union, Monkayo, Davao De Oro", "La Paz, Carmen, Davao Del Norte", "Madaum, Tagum, Davao Del Norte", "Mankilam, Tagum, Davao Del Norte", "Barangay 31-D, Davao, Davao Del Sur", "Cabantian, Davao, Davao Del Sur", "Lizada, Davao, Davao Del Sur", "Badas, Mati, Davao Oriental", "Busaon, Banisilan, Cotabato", "Lebe, Kiamba, Sarangani", "Apopong, Gen. Santos, South Cotabato", "San Isidro, Gen. Santos, South Cotabato", "Poblacion, Polomolok, South Cotabato", "Zone IV, Koronadal, South Cotabato", "Upper Maculan, Lake Sebu, South Cotabato", "Cannery Site, Polomolok, South Cotabato", "Bukay Pait, Tantangan, South Cotabato", "La Caridad, Prosperidad, Agusan Del Sur", "Bayugan 2, San Francisco, Agusan Del Sur", "New Tubigon, Sibagat, Agusan Del Sur", "Laguna, Cagdianao, Dinagat Islands", "Albor, Libjo, Dinagat Islands", "San Juan, Surigao, Surigao Del Norte", "Telaje, Tandag, Surigao Del Sur", "Kauswagan, San Agustin, Surigao Del Sur", "Pagalongan Masioon, Ditsaan-Ramain, Lanao Del Sur", "Balagunun, Maguing, Lanao Del Sur", "Gapao Balindong, Taraka, Lanao Del Sur", "Tamontaka, Datu Odin Sinsuat, Maguindanao", "Tanuel, Datu Odin Sinsuat, Maguindanao", "Lepak, Pandag, Maguindanao", "Bongo, South Upi, Maguindanao", "Anuling, Patikul, Sulu", "Gandasuli, Patikul, Sulu", "Panglima Alari, Sitangkai, Tawi-Tawi"
))
  ) %>%
  count(`barangay`, `call_status`) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = `call_status`,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

table_cs_min <- table_cs_min[, c(names(table_cs_min)[1], as.character(sort(as.numeric(names(table_cs_min)[-1]))))]

# Step 2: Add row totals
table_cs_min <- table_cs_min %>%
  mutate(`Total Calls` = rowSums(across(where(is.numeric))))

# Step 3: Add column totals
col_totals <- table_cs_min %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum)) %>%
  mutate(barangay = "Total Calls")

# Step 4: Bind totals row
final_table_cs_min <- bind_rows(table_cs_min, col_totals)

names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == "barangay"] <- "Mindanao Barangay"

final_table_cs_min <- final_table_cs_min[, c(names(final_table_cs_min)[1], "Total Calls", setdiff(names(final_table_cs_min), c(names(final_table_cs_min)[1], "Total Calls")))]

names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 1] <- "CMP"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 2] <- "PNC"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 3] <- "PSC"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 4] <- "SCB"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 5] <- "RFS"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 6] <- "JRG"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 7] <- "NRG"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 8] <- "NIS"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 9] <- "DKH"
names(final_table_cs_min)[names(final_table_cs_min) == 10] <- "RCC"

```

::: {.row}
::: {.column width="85%" .mx-auto}
::: {.card}
## **Mindanao Latest Call Status**

```{r}

reactable(
  final_table_cs_min,
  columns = list(
    'Mindanao Barangay' = colDef(
      sticky = "left",
      minWidth = 300,
      maxWidth = 300,
      resizable = TRUE,
      align = "left",
      style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      ),
    'Total Calls' = colDef(
      sticky = "left",
      minWidth = 150,
      maxWidth = 150,
      resizable = TRUE,
      style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      )
    ),
  striped = TRUE,
  highlight = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE,
  outlined = TRUE,
  compact = TRUE,
  wrap = FALSE,
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    align = "center",
    minWidth = 100,   # minimum width
    maxWidth = 500,  # maximum width
    resizable = TRUE # allow user to drag/resize
    ),
  defaultPageSize = 15,
  pagination = TRUE
)
```
:::
:::
:::
